app.name: HiluX DS8
app.description: Control your LightSolutions HiluX DS8 (Powered by Shelly) tunable white downlight.

list_devices.title: Searching for HiluX DS8 lights...
list_devices.subtitle: Make sure your lights are powered on and connected to your Wi-Fi network.

pair.no_devices: No HiluX DS8 lights found on your network. Make sure they are powered on and connected to Wi-Fi.

address.label: IP Address
address.hint: The local IP address of the HiluX DS8. Set a static IP or DHCP reservation in your router to prevent it from changing.

error.not_found: Could not reach the HiluX DS8 at the configured IP address.
error.invalid_device: This does not appear to be a HiluX DS8 device.
error.timeout: The device did not respond in time. Check that it is powered on and connected to your network.
